nasb.text: For I will restore you to health And I will heal you of your wounds,’ declares the Lord, ‘Because they have called you an outcast, saying: “It is Zion; no one cares for her.” ’

esv.text: For I will restore health to you, and your wounds I will heal, declares the Lord, because they have called you an outcast: ‘It is Zion, for whom no one cares!’

cnv.text: 雖然人都說你是被放逐的， 是沒有人關心的錫安； 我卻必使你康復， 醫治你的創傷。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 虽然你们这些锡安人无家可归， 无人关心， 但我要医治你们的创伤， 使你们康复。 这是耶和华说的。”
